description: Return a list of all Incident Severity Levels associated with a Company.

parameters.name: filters[email_trigger]
parameters.description: Return item(s) set to trigger email notifications.

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[push_notification_trigger]
parameters.description: Return item(s) set to trigger push notifications.

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

name.description: Name of the Incident Severity Level

procore_default_name.description: Procore default name of the Incident Severity Level

active.description: Denotes whether the Incident Severity Level is active

email_trigger.description: Denotes whether an email should be sent

push_notification_trigger.description: Denotes whether a push notification should be sent

order.description: Ranking order of the Incident Severity Level
